title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fire-Boltt International Enterprises:
Fire-Boltt International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
